must_have_quals: 1+ years relevant experience and a Bachelor's degree OR Any equivalent combination of education and experience, Strong foundation in programming concepts, algorithms, and data structures, Experience with backend development using Java and frameworks such as Spring Boot or Micronaut, Understanding of RESTful web services and Service-Oriented Architecture (SOA) principles, Familiarity with relational and NoSQL databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Cassandra), Exposure to version control systems (e.g., Git) and collaborative development workflows (e.g., Agile, CI/CD)

core_responsibilities: Implements tasks within the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC), receiving structure and oversight from more experienced staff, Follows well-established internal conventions and standard procedures, Understands internal standards & processes and applies them to make technical decisions, Collaborates with peers, manager, and project lead to gain understanding of tasks and review solutions, May contribute to code & design reviews
job_summary: PayPal has been revolutionizing commerce globally for more than 25 years. As a Backend Software Engineer (Java), you’ll collaborate with experienced engineers to design, develop, and optimize backend components that ensure performance, reliability, and scalability across our global payment platform.
